title: Crafting Station: J/EMI Edition Updated
description: Adds a crafting station with JEI support !
body:
This is just a fork of [tfarecnim's Crafting Station](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crafting-station) mod and a bit of code from the [JEI Edition](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/crafting-station-jei-edition) ported to 1.21.

This mod wasn't ported to 1.21 yet and i have decided to do it, i will keep being supported for years to come.

Yes, Polymorph is still supported !

Crafting Station is a slight tweak to how crafting tables work. Origanlly from Tinkers Construct, this crafting station keeps your items stored and displays them on top. It also has access to any neighbouring inventories (with an optional blacklist for modpack creators)

Players with JEI can now get the "+" icon on their crafting station to import a recipe, just like you'd expect on any other crafting bench.

GIF to show functionality (from the original JEI Edition) :

![](https://s9.gifyu.com/images/SUs0F.gif)



Support on [Discord](https://discord.gg/m4EHeRjfZ9)
